query: SELECT MIN(engagementScore) as min_eng, MAX(engagementScore) as max_eng, AVG(engagementScore) as avg_eng, MIN(notaEvolucao) as min_nota, MAX(notaEvolucao) as max_nota, AVG(notaEvolucao) as avg_nota FROM mentoring_sessions WHERE engagementScore IS NOT NULL;
